meaning: n.外交官,有外交手腕的人,有权谋的人
examples: Fearey had all the charm and urbanity of the trained diplomat.
The two countries have each expelled another diplomat following a round of tit-for-tat expulsions.
He was the most distinguished diplomat in American history.
The Bush administration's senior diplomat on the North Korean nuclear issue, is in Beijing today.
"Iran's delegation can't go home and say it is a good offer, " said the diplomat.
